title: dendrochilum dolichobrachium
intro: Dendrochilum dolichobrachium, also known as the long-armed Dendrochilum, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Dendrochilum dolichobrachium include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
